title: Moving boards to the folder through integrations
excerpt:
Is there any way of moving my boards to a particular folder through integrations?? 
Through integrations I’m creating the boards .But my requirement is the created boards should be moved directly into a particular folder…

posts.author: Stromasys (Ciora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way of moving my boards to a particular folder through integrations??
Through integrations I’m creating the boards .But my requirement is the created boards should be moved directly into a particular folder through integrations, Is there any method for that??
